characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: The main protagonist of the show. He's a 12-year-old Indian-American boy who lives with his parents and his anthropomorphic pet snake. All-Loving Hero: He loves to resolve conflicts amicably and bring people together, as seen in "Blackout", "The Giving G" and towards the end of "D.I.N.K.". Badass Adorable: He's asEndearingly Dorkyas is he is resourceful, adventurous and genuinely heroic. Beware the Nice Ones: Despite how cheerful and friendly he is, he has an angry and assertive side that comes out whenever he feels he's been tricked or duped. Craig has brought out this side of him in episodes like "Depants Day" and "Heartyface" (the former when Craig tricked him into losing a depants game, and the latter where Craig scared him by going missing, which wound up just being a ploy to take a photo to get attention on a social media website.) But Not Too Foreign: He has an Indian father and a Caucasian mother.

characters.name: Sanjay Patel
characters.description: The main protagonist of the show. He's a 12-year-old Indian-American boy who lives with his parents and his anthropomorphic pet snake. All-Loving Hero: He loves to resolve conflicts amicably and bring people together, as seen in "Blackout", "The Giving G" and towards the end of "D.I.N.K.". Badass Adorable: He's asEndearingly Dorkyas is he is resourceful, adventurous and genuinely heroic. Beware the Nice Ones: Despite how cheerful and friendly he is, he has an angry and assertive side that comes out whenever he feels he's been tricked or duped. Craig has brought out this side of him in episodes like "Depants Day" and "Heartyface" (the former when Craig tricked him into losing a depants game, and the latter where Craig scared him by going missing, which wound up just being a ploy to take a photo to get attention on a social media website.) But Not Too Foreign: He has an Indian father and a Caucasian mother.

characters.name: Craig Slithers
characters.description: Sanjay's talkative pet snake and best friend. Badass Adorable: Craig looks like a plush toy, however he's also a semi-feral animal who mauls other wild beastsalivefor lunch. Berserk Button: Calling him a pet seems to make him rather upset. Breakout Character: In character polls, he usually takes the top spot; not to mentionmaking a nice number of viewers want their own (talking) pet snake. It's even better on Tumblr, where he's adored by a quite a few members and heck, even has afan blogabout him! Big Brother Instinct: He's shown to act like an older brother to Sanjay, which is ironic since he's the newest member of the Patel family. He is willing to risk himself to save Sanjay even when he's mad at him.

characters.name: Vijay Patel
characters.description: Sanjay's father who is Indian. He owns a clearance store in the neighborhood. He has invented various mechanicals, such as a party-obsessed, dancing robot, the Partybot. Bollywood Nerd: He's from India, runs a discount merchandise store, invents in his spare time, and is overjoyed when Sanjay and Craig want to go to India to star in Remington Tufflips's movie, only to be disappointed when he discovers how much India has changed since his childhood. He eventually learns to adapt to the fact that things have changed and treasures the quailty bonding time he spent with his family, including Craig. Like Father, Like Son: He's like his son in terms of personality even to this day. They're both cheery goofballs. Masculine Girl, Feminine Boy: As seen in the first episode where Darlene is fascinated with the grossness of her hospital work and happily talks about it with her son, while Vijay feels sick just hearing about it.

characters.name: Darlene Patel
characters.description: Sanjay's mother who works at a hospital as a nurse and a surgeon. She often tells Sanjay stories about her work. Action Mom: In "Butts Up" she competes against Noodman to save Craig and the other pets. Berserk Button:Has been seen to lose her mind during a power outage.DO NOT wreck her room, or she will kill you! Has been seen to lose her mind during a power outage. DO NOT wreck her room, or she will kill you!

characters.name: Hector Flanagan
characters.description: A chubby and goofy 12-year-old boy who is also one of Sanjay's friends. He wears an eye patch and has a soft and generous heart. The Big Guy: Is clearly the largest of the kids. Cloudcuckoolander: He is the goofiest and the silliest out of the gang. Expy: He is similar toGene Belcher, which isn't surprising given this show is from the same people behindBob's Burgers. Eyepatch of Power: For him at least, it's heavily implied that he's only wearing it for show. "2 Tuff 2 Watch" has him pretend to be awake by moving his patch to the other side and keeping a glass eye exposed, confirming he only has one eye.

characters.name: Megan Sparkles
characters.description: A 12-year-old girl who is one of Sanjay's best friends. She takes part in beauty pageants, among other talents. She is shown to have a crush on Sanjay. Berserk Button: DO NOT mess around with her adorable gerbil, Booger Johnson, or she will kill you. Disappeared Dad: Like Belle Pepper's mom, Megan's dad's status and whereabouts were never mentioned on the show. Gamer Chick: "Combo Attack" reveals that she's very into video games, especiallySpirit Animal Pro Fighter 2. She and Chido even start a video game-themed band together called Character Select, and make a song called "Press Start". Girly Bruiser: AGirly Girlwho loves pink and pageantry and can also kick butt. She's earned the title of Little Miss Mixed-Martial Arts,according to her Nickelodeon Africa character bio.

characters.name: The Dicksons
characters.description: Three siblings who have a hard rock band called the "Tuff Skulls". Sandy and Scabs are fraternal twins who play the guitar, and their younger brother Baby Richard plays the drums. In addition, there is also their grotesque-looking mother, Brenda. Enfant Terrible: Baby Richard frequently torments and competes against Sanjay and Craig. Hands-Off Parenting: Brenda usually lets her children do whatever they want, even if it means getting in toruble with the law. Hidden Depths: Brenda usually acts like she doesn't care much about her children or what they do, even thworing a shoe at her daughter's face in a game show but in "Enter Sandman" it is revealed that she does love her children very much and tries to help them befriend Sanjay and Craig by telling them about how hard her kids were trying to impress them. Lady Looks Like a Dude: Mrs. Dickson is unsightly and could pass for an overweight male. Sandy counts to a lesser extent because she looks pretty similar to her twin brother.

characters.name: Leslie Noodman
characters.description: Sanjay and Craig's next door neighbor and mortal enemy who hates snakes and plans to get rid of Craig. Abusive Parents: Noodman's father enjoyed torturing him with snakes when he was a kid. He still does it even when he's an adult. Butt-Monkey: The poor guy never seems to catch a break from his father or Sanjay and Craig's pranks. Child Hater: Not only does he hate snakes, he also hates children to a lesser extent (though this is because children remind him of snakes). Even Evil Has Loved Ones: He's an obnoxious jerk, but he really loves his cat, Lady Butterscotch. He even painteda picture of him and her!◊

characters.name: Remington Tufflips
characters.description: Sanjay and Craig's idol, a washed-up action movie hero who lives in a trailer park, but is nonetheless Lundgren's biggest celebrity. Character as Himself: In the end credits.Though Jay Howell later revealed on his Instagram that the actual voice of Tufflips is Chris D'Elia. Cool Shades: He wears a pair of black shades,even at night, and will rarely lower them. Expy: He's a parody ofElvis Presleyas he's gotten fatter over the years. Gasshole: Of the burping variety, especially when he drinks buttermilk.

characters.name: Belle Pepper
characters.description: One of Sanjay's friends who works at the Frycade, Sanjay and Craig's favorite place to hang out. Sanjay has a crush on her. Dude Magnet: Somewhat implied to be one. Besides Sanjay's crush on her, Hector's also been shown fawning over her, and a minor character named Tyson has a thing for her, much to Sanjay's chagrin. Granola Girl: She certainly has shades of this. She adorns a hippie headband and in "2 Tuff 2 Watch", she's passionate about preserving a sanctuary for reptiles. Jerkass Ball: She's uncharacteristically selfish and brash in "Fowl Work", where she pressures Sanjay into keeping her secret about throwing parties at the Frycade during its after hours, and reacts angrily and defensively toward him when he tries to talk some sense into her.She winds up confessing to her father about the parties, though, and explains that she was doing it because she felt overworked. Penny empathizes with her and starts giving her Fridays and weekends off. Meaningful Name: Her name is a play on "bell pepper", which is a sweet pepper. Fittingly enough, she's a sweet, amiableNice Girl. "Belle" is also a French word that comes from the Latinbellafor "beautiful", and denotes a girl or woman who's admired for her beauty and charm. Belle Pepper is admired by Sanjay.

characters.name: Sam Lastnamè
characters.description: One of Sanjay's friends who mostly serves as a background character. She made her debut in the Season 2 episode, "Butt's Up", and took the spotlight again in Season 3's "G.U.T.S. Busters". Break the Cutie: In her debut episode, "Butt's Up". Living Prop: Her only major appearances was her debut episode and the GUTS episode. For the rest the series, she's just used as a background character. Temporarily a Villain: In "Huggle Day". Tomboy with a Girly Streak: She's pretty emotional and sensitive for the sporty type.

characters.name: Ronnie Slithers
characters.description: Craig's long-lost brother who made his debut in the Season 1 finale, "A Tail of Two Slithers". He was extremely rich, as he was the former owner of a companycalled International Shovel which produces snake-killing shovels. (Despite the fact that he's supposed to be a snake). Ax-Crazy: This gem, Craig evenlampshades it.Ronnie: I decided then and there,the way to get you back was to become a human too. And what's the most powerful human?Craig: Um...King Kong?Ronnie: A HUMAN WITH A SHOVEL! AND WHO IS THE MOST POWERFUL HUMAN WITH A SHOVEL?Craig: Um...Ronnie: I AM! I AM THE MOST POWERFUL HUMAN WITH A SHOVEL! AH AH AH I AM A POWERFUL HUMAN! I AM A SHOVEL!Craig: Look at you! You're crazy! Big Brother Instinct: Ronnie later develops this towards Craig and even Sanjay. He protects them from falling objects and loose tigers, getting hurt in the process. Boomerang Bigot: In his debut episode, he once had some sort of hatred to his own kind, since heowned a company dedicated to killing snakes, andpretends to be a human being instead. Cain and Abel: The Cain to Craig and Sanjay's Abel. He tries to kill Sanjay and Craig because their friendship offends his lonely nature.

characters.name: Lady Butterscotch
characters.description: Mr. Noodman's pet cat who is very admired and obsessed over by him.She used to be Darlene's pet until Noodman won her in a game of Butt's Up. Heavy Sleeper:Played for Laughswhen Sanjay drags her by the tail, down the stairs, and out on the front lawn and only then does she wake up. Right-Hand Cat: She's never seen apart from her loving owner. Sleepyhead: Befitting a cat, she takes a lot of naps.

characters.name: Tyson
characters.description: Sanjay's primary rival for Belle's affections. He carries a scooter in his pants, and speaks in a British accent. The Bully: He's one for the lead quartet, Sanjay in particular. Evil Brit: Downplayed. He's British, snooty, rude, and constantly tries to up-show Sanjay just because he can. Jerkass: He's a dick to Sanjay and the gang for no reason other than he doesn't like them. Only One Name: All he's ever referred to is "Tyson".

characters.name: Huggle Bunny
characters.description: A mysterious, magical man in a bunny suit, who mostly serves as a carnival entertainer. The town of Lundgren celebrates a Christmas-like holiday centered around him, which they name "Huggle Day".

characters.name: Chido
characters.description: A sarcastic and tough red-headed girl who has a soft side. The Bully: Her debut episode, "Bike-o Psycho", establishes her as one.Sanjay:(Reading Chido's name on bicycle)Chid-do. What's a Chid-do?Chido:Chido. That's my name.Sanjay: Prove it!Chido:(Grabs random kid on scooter)Say my name!Kid: Chido!(Runs away scared) The Dreaded: Because of her bullying tendencies, she's seen as this by most of the other kids—though Megan is an exception, and it is her lack of fear of Chido that leads to the two of them becoming friends. Fiery Redhead: She's tough, sarcastic, and has a pretty short temper. Gamer Chick: As seen in "Combo Attack", she's very into video games, especiallySpirit Animal Pro Fighter 2. She even starts a video game-themed band with Megan called Character Select, and they make a song called "Press Start".

characters.name: Stasi Stuntman
characters.description: A stuntgirl and famous student at the Stuntman School, with her mom and dad as the founders of the Stuntman School. Huge Schoolgirl: She towers over the other 12 year-olds in Lundgren. (Sanjay, Hector, Megan, Sam, and Chido) Though she still looks quite short compared to Glen. (Who happens to have the body of a ripped grown man, despite the fact that he is apparently 12.) Jerk with a Heart of Gold: The reason she is a stuntgirl and has a big ego is because of her overbearing parents. The end of her episode reveals (After hearing Sanjay's speech about how he has to be his own lead) that she wants to live her dream of doing stand-up comedy.

characters.name: Penny Pepper
characters.description: The owner of The Frycade and Belle's father. Gender-Blender Name: Penny is used more often as a female name. Cloud Cuckoo Lander: Usually. Nice Guy: He's always friendly to his customers, especially Chicken Chuck and the Patel family. Only Sane Man: He's pretty reasonable half the time.

characters.name: Chicken Chuck
characters.description: The oldest and best friend of Penny, he's been going to the Frycade for years. He's a bit of a loser. Ascended Extra: He starts off as a background character whose record is beaten to show off Tyson's wing eating skills before showing up more later. Carpet of Virility: He's a very hairy man; his chest hair looks like it's going up his neck. '80s Hair: His hair is very long and very wild. Hidden Depths: In "Guitar Zeroes" he turns out to be a skilled rock guitarist who gave up the rock lifestyle due to his crazed fans.

characters.name: Debbie Sparkles
characters.description: Expy: She seems to be a cross betweenMs. EndiveandMama June Shannon. Like Mother, Unlike Daughter: She is very different from her own daughter,probably becauseshe may be adopted. Recurring Extra: She's tangentially connected to Megan, but beyond that she's sometimes used for one-off gags.

characters.name: Grandma Wheezy
characters.description: Sanjay's Grandmother who first appeared in the Season 2 episode "Conquistador". Cool Old Lady: A perfect example of one. I Have Many Names: Her many nicknames include "G-Ma Dubz", "Old Mother Hubbard", "Mother in a Cupboard", "Rat Rider", and "Darlene's Mother". Never Mess with Granny: Despite her age, she can keep up with her grandchildren. She alsobeats up a living and seemingly dangerous Conquistador statue in "Conquistador" to protect her family, before finding out that the statue isn't malevolent as previously thought. A dance party ensues.

characters.name: Noodman's Father
characters.description: Thevery abusiveseventy-year-old father of Leslie Noodman. He enjoys making his son's life miserable by pranking him with his fear of snakes. Abusive Dad: Torments his son any chance he gets, whether it's throwning snakes at him or humiliating him in front of his girlfriend. It runs in the family as his father abused him. Chuck Cunningham Syndrome: He appeared in a few episodes in the first season, though in Season 2 he only shows up in one episode. After that, he disappeared without a trace. Freudian Excuse: He scared his son with snakes, but we learn that his father scared him the same way with cats. Greater-Scope Villain:Word of Godsays so.

characters.name: Hank Flanagan
characters.description: Hector's "awesome" dad, who is apparently said to be Irish.

characters.name: Mrs. Flanagan
characters.description: Hector's mother, who is apparently said to be Hispanic.

characters.name: Hector's Grandmother
characters.description: Hector's Grandma who cooks Hector's favorite Tamales, and is considered to be quite a hugger when greeting people.

characters.name: Farmer Larry
characters.description: The crazy farmer at the Blueberry Farm, as well as the current owner of 100 dogs that Sanjay won in "Dog Wave".

characters.name: Bertha Van Weld
characters.description: A young cyborg-like woman who is "the singularity", as well as the head of the Lundgren Tech Expo.

characters.name: Maximum Dennis
characters.description: A popular American Tough Guy. Sanjay and Craig once disguised as him in order to beat Tyson, and to attract Belle.
